David came to possess the throne of Israel after he had reigned seven years in Hebron, over Judah only. God's plans will be fulfilled at last, whatever difficulties lie in the way. The way to be truly great is to be really useful, to devote all our talents to the Lord.

An account is given of David’s worthies, the great men who served him. Yet David considered his success not as from the mighty men that were with him, but from the mighty God, whose presence is everything. In strengthening him, they strengthened themselves and their own interest, for his advancement was theirs. We will gain by what we do in our places for the support of the kingdom of the Son of David; and those who are faithful to Him will find their names registered much more to their honor than these are in the records of fame.
